title: add support for on failure actions in healthchecks
body:
podman recently added support for failure actions in healthchecks. Support these by exposing the specgen entity

Signed-off-by: Charlie Doern <cdoern@redhat.com>

comments.body: @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL, I think this is all set. Just need to backport now cc/ @mheon

I really should not be merging things in Python land... But given urgency -
/approve
/lgtm
